summary: Comprehensive testing of EcoMarketplace completed - both backend APIs and frontend functionality tested successfully with excellent results

minor_bugs.issue: Login test failed with 401 Invalid credentials during automated testing
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - likely test logic issue as registration works and current user endpoint works with JWT

minor_bugs.issue: Logout works correctly but timeout waiting for exact landing page URL pattern
